title: Junior Investment Banker at Upstox Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Upstox Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Upstox Asia Pacific Associates in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox Asia Pacific Associates:
Upstox Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox Asia Pacific Associates!
